title: SuiCreate-AeronauticsPBR
description: Pixel-style industrial PBR resource pack for CreateAeronautics.
body:
SuiCreate-AeronauticsPBR is a pixel-style industrial PBR resource pack made for Create-Aeronautics.

It adds normal maps and roughness maps to Create-Aeronautics blocks, and some blocks also include parallax mapping for better depth when using PBR-compatible shaders, while still keeping Minecraft’s original pixelated look instead of smooth realism.

如果你喜欢这个材质包欢迎关注我的Bilibili频道：https://space.bilibili.com/1703785283
